response.global_analysis: The video segment consists of a long dialogue conclusion to Shishiro Botan's 3D live, followed by an end credit sequence with voiceover highlights, and finally the opening of the song 'MUST RεLiVE'. Since no reference lyrics were provided in the JSON, I have transcribed and translated the spoken dialogue and song lyrics directly from the audio and on-screen text, following the decoding hierarchy to ensure accurate spelling of philosophical terms like 'Butterfly Dream'. Timing is strictly aligned with the vocal delivery.

subtitles.original: それとも、ライブをしてるあたしの方が、今のあたしが見てる夢...?
subtitles.english: Or is it the 'me' performing the live that's the dream my current self is seeing...?

subtitles.original: 胡蝶の夢って知ってる？
subtitles.english: Do you know of the Butterfly Dream?

subtitles.original: 君の言う通り、この世界はもしかしたらもう一人の君が見ている夢なのかもしれないし、
subtitles.english: Just as you say, this world might be a dream that another version of you is seeing...

subtitles.original: もしかしたらさっきまで君が見ていた「ライブ」こそがこの世界の君が見ている夢かもしれない。
subtitles.english: ...or perhaps the 'live' you were watching until just now is the dream that the you in this world is seeing.

subtitles.original: もしかしたら、いつか訪れる未来なのかもしれないし、
subtitles.english: Perhaps it's a future that will come someday...

subtitles.original: 観測された違う世界線を垣間見てるだけなのかもしれない。
subtitles.english: ...or maybe you're just catching a glimpse of a different observed timeline.

subtitles.original: 世界は不確定なんだよ。
subtitles.english: The world is indeterminate.

subtitles.original: 「音楽」は、そんなたくさんの世界を繋ぐ糸みたいなもの。
subtitles.english: Music is like a thread that connects all those many worlds.

subtitles.original: 数え切れないほど存在する可能性の中で、それでも音楽だけはいつだってそこにあるものなの。
subtitles.english: Among the countless possibilities that exist, music is the one thing that will always be there.

subtitles.original: うちたちが、ぼたんのことを思う気持ちもね。
subtitles.english: Just like the way we all feel about you, Botan.

subtitles.original: わため、どこにいてもぼたんちゃんのことが大好きだよ！
subtitles.english: Watame will always love Botan-chan, no matter where she is!

subtitles.original: ぼたん先輩の絵、また描きたいなー！
subtitles.english: I want to draw Botan-senpai again!

subtitles.original: ふふ、ししろと同じ時間をのんびり過ごすの、アキロゼはすっごく好きかなー。
subtitles.english: Hehe, Akirose really loves spending relaxing time with Shishiro.

subtitles.original: ぼたん先輩、いつかは私と一緒にまた歌ってほしいです！
subtitles.english: Botan-senpai, I want you to sing with me again someday!

subtitles.original: でも、その前に...
subtitles.english: But before that...

subtitles.original: せーの、誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: One, two... Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: みんな... ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Everyone... Thank you.

subtitles.original: みんなの気持ち、送ってくれたお祝いの言葉... 確かに受け取ったよ。
subtitles.english: Your feelings, the congratulatory words you sent... I've certainly received them.

subtitles.original: すごく... すごく、うれしい。
subtitles.english: I'm very... very happy.

subtitles.original: 今ならきっと、前だけを見て走っていられる。
subtitles.english: Right now, I'm sure I can keep running, looking only forward.

subtitles.original: これからも新しい世界に、まだ見たことのないたくさんの可能性に、挑戦することができる！
subtitles.english: From now on, I can challenge new worlds and the many possibilities I haven't seen yet!

subtitles.original: だってここが... あたしたちの「最高」だから。
subtitles.english: Because this is... our 'best'.

subtitles.original: だから、この先も一緒に行こう！
subtitles.english: So, let's keep going together from here on!

subtitles.original: 次に生まれるのが、どんな世界でも。
subtitles.english: No matter what world is born next.

subtitles.original: みんなのこと、本当に、本当に大好きだよ！
subtitles.english: I really, really love you all!

subtitles.original: 次にあたしが生まれるのは、どこなんだろう
subtitles.english: I wonder where I will be born next.

subtitles.original: でもそれがどこでも大丈夫
subtitles.english: But no matter where it is, it's okay.

subtitles.original: さよならは言わない
subtitles.english: I won't say goodbye.

subtitles.original: きっとあたしはこの幸せな物語を胸に どこまでだって飛べるはずだから
subtitles.english: Because I'm sure I can fly anywhere with this happy story in my heart.

subtitles.original: そこに「音楽」と、みんなからもらった温かくて優しい思いがあれば！
subtitles.english: As long as there's music and the warm, kind feelings I received from everyone!

subtitles.original: 次の世界で、また会おう――
subtitles.english: Let's meet again in the next world—

subtitles.original: 君がいる世界で――！
subtitles.english: In the world where you are—!

subtitles.original: 新しい世界に旅立つ？
subtitles.english: Depart for a new world?

subtitles.original: だって決めたんだ。それでも――何でも大好きだからって
subtitles.english: Because I've decided. Even so—because I love everything.

subtitles.original: えー、わためはまだまだそばに居てあげるから、
subtitles.english: Eh, Watame will still be by your side,

subtitles.original: きっと思い出になるよ...
subtitles.english: so I'm sure it'll become a memory...

subtitles.original: 大丈夫。だってお互い、どこにいてもすぐ見つかるんだから！
subtitles.english: It's okay. Because we'll find each other instantly, no matter where we are!

subtitles.original: 「一緒に頑張ろう」
subtitles.english: "Let's do our best together."

subtitles.original: また、いつか一緒にね
subtitles.english: Let's be together again someday.

subtitles.original: あたしがここにいるのは、みんなのおかげなんだよ
subtitles.english: The reason I'm here is thanks to everyone.

subtitles.original: うん、これからはその想いを持って進めば
subtitles.english: Yeah, from now on, if you move forward with those feelings,

subtitles.original: きっとまた会えるって信じてるよ
subtitles.english: I believe we'll definitely meet again.

subtitles.original: うん、あともうちょっとだけ！
subtitles.english: Yeah, just a little bit more!

subtitles.original: 止まらない時計の針を
subtitles.english: The hands of the clock that won't stop

subtitles.original: 追い越して
subtitles.english: Overtake them
